issues.title: Device Request - Aubess Tuya 1-gang ZigBee 3.0 Mini Smart Switch - _TZ3000_fdxihpp7 / TS0001

prs.title: Fix HOBEIAN 10G radar sensor: IAS motion conflict, battery read, DP corrections
feat: Add support for Bseed 1-Gang Switch with physical button detection
Added separate driver for Tuya/Bseed touch dimmer
fixes #1059, RGB LED Strip Controller, _TZ3210_eejm8dcr / TS0505B
Added support for GIRIER Contact Sensor & Benexmart 12V RGBCW Dimmable Spotlight
Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"
Addition of Garage Door Controller and combined Fan on/off, fan speed, Light on/off drivers.

aiSummary:
### GitHub Activity Summary for Universal Tuya Zigbee

#### New Device Requests
1. **Garagedoor Controller**
   - **User:** Wuma68
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZE204_nklqjk62
   - **Supported Drivers:** garage_door
   - **Issue Link:** [View Issue](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/128)

2. **Aubess Tuya 1-gang ZigBee 3.0 Mini Smart Switch**
   - **User:** erlandjack
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZ3000_fdxihpp7
   - **Supported Drivers:** climate_sensor, plug_energy_monitor, switch_1gang, switch_2gang, switch_3gang, switch_4gang
   - **Issue Link:** [View Issue](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/963)

#### Supported Fingerprints
- **_TZE204_nklqjk62**: Supported in the garage_door driver.
- **_TZ3000_fdxihpp7**: Supported across multiple drivers including climate_sensor and various switch types.

#### Fingerprints from Forks for Integration
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified for integration in this cycle.

#### Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **Fix HOBEIAN 10G Radar Sensor**
   - **User:** michelhelsdingen
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZE200_rhgsbacq
   - **Link:** [PR #125](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/125) (Closed, not merged)

2. **Support for _TZ3000_ysdv91bk**
   - **User:** packetninja
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZ3000_ysdv91bk
   - **Link:** [PR #118](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/118) (Closed, not merged)

3. **Bseed 1-Gang Switch with Physical Button Detection**
   - **User:** packetninja
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZ3000_blhvsaqf
   - **Link:** [PR #116](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/116) (Closed, not merged)

4. **Separate Driver for Tuya/Bseed Touch Dimmer**
   - **User:** packetninja
   - **Fingerprints:** _TZE200_3p5ydos3, _TZE204_n9ctkb6j
   - **Link:** [PR #111](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/111) (Merged)

5. **Added _TZE204_n9ctkb6j, Lower/Upper Case ID**
   - **User:** packetninja
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZE204_n9ctkb6j
   - **Link:** [PR #106](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/106) (Merged)

6. **Support for Garage Door Controller and Combined Fan Drivers**
   - **User:** TKGHill
   - **Fingerprints:** _TZE204_lawxy9e2, _TZE204_nklqjk62
   - **Link:** [PR #1210](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1210) (Open)

#### Conclusion
The current activity highlights ongoing requests for new device support and several PRs that could enhance functionality. Notably, the garage door controller and the Aubess switch are key requests that could expand our driver capabilities. Please review the linked issues and PRs for further details and potential contributions.
